---
title: "About the Conference"
---

The International Pteridological Congress has been held periodically since 1983, and the 6th Congress will be held in Yokosuka, Japan in 2027.

## Organizing Committee

- Atsushi Ebihara, National Museum of Nature and Science (chair)
- Joel H. Nitta, Chiba University (secretary general)
- Tao Fujiawara, Tokyo Metropolitan University
- Noriaki Murakami, Museum of Nature and Human Activities, Hyogo
- Chie Tsutsumi, National Museum of Nature and Science
- Kaoru Yamamoto, Yokosuka City Museum

## Past Conferences

- ~~2020: Ferns in Focus~~ (Brazil, cancelled due to COVID-19)
- 2015: Next Generation Pteridology (Smithsonian Institution)
- 2004: Ferns for the 21st Century (Royal Botanic Garden Edinburgh)
- 1995: Holttum Memorial Pteridophyte Symposium (Kew Gardens)
- 1983: International Symposium on the Biology of Pteridophytes (Royal Botanic Garden Edinburgh)
